capabilities.target: Arduino Uno R4 WiFi TinyUSB CDC device interface
capabilities.justification: Firmware must read Board VM protocol frames arriving over the built-in USB-C SerialUSB CDC endpoint.

capabilities.target: Arduino Uno R4 WiFi TinyUSB CDC device interface
capabilities.justification: Firmware must write Board VM protocol responses back over the built-in USB-C SerialUSB CDC endpoint.

justification: Board-specific embedded USB CDC boundary for the Uno R4 WiFi. Generic protocol, stream, and VM code remain in reusable crates.
